content:
Plato’s Cave (The Philosopher’s Trial)
Students must escape a staged “cave” by proving that literature reveals deeper truths about reality.


✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps gameplay directly relevant to weekly themes.
• Structures the course as an adventure through literary history.
• Gives students a sense of progression through time and artistic evolution.

📜 3. Buffs & Debuffs Now Affect Assignments & Timed Constraints

📜 Buffs and debuffs now modify assignment conditions.

✔ Some buffs remove restrictions (e.g., using outside sources in a close reading).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 233 (chunk 233/555)
